seoTitle: Hartys Plains vs Harwood — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hartys Plains and Harwood. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Hartys Plains vs Harwood: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hartys Plains and Harwood.
heading: Hartys Plains vs Harwood — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hartys Plains, New South Wales and Harwood, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Harwood has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Hartys Plains (53/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hartys Plains or Harwood safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hartys Plains has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Harwood scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hartys Plains scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Harwood scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hartys Plains or Harwood?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Harwood has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 3.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
